name: Signed-in user calculates metrics and gets an AI insight
description: After signing in with an email, calculating metrics on the dashboard shows churn, retention, ARPU and a risk status; generating an AI insight then shows a written summary of the project's retention health.

planSteps.description: Type a valid email address into the sign-in field
Click the button that enters the dashboard
Click the button that calculates metrics from the pre-filled project form
Verify the metrics area shows a churn rate percentage, a retention rate percentage, an ARPU dollar value, and a risk status label
Click the button that generates an AI insight
Verify the AI insight panel shows a written summary sentence describing the project's churn or retention health
